programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Rumors of large buffalo herds prompt Bat and a number of hunters to ride out in search of pelts; Earp learns about a roaming tribe of Apache hunters and heads out to warn Bat, but hostilities quickly break out between the groups.

programme.title: The Hard Man
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger (Guy Madison) turns deputy sheriff; a woman (Valerie French) wants him to kill her cattle-baron husband (Lorne Greene).

programme.title: Shoot-Out at Medicine Bend
programme.desc: Just discharged from service, Capt. Devlin (Randolph Scott) and his cavalry pals Maitland (James Garner) and Clegg (Gordon Jones) travel to Devlin's brother's home, but arrive to see the place overrun by American Indians. Devlin's sibling is killed because of his shoddy ammo, so the captain and his friends decide to hunt down the man who sold the bum bullets. They ride into town and find that the culprit is Clark (James Craig), a rich businessman who has the law in his pocket.

programme.title: The Howards of Virginia
programme.desc: When his impoverished past is uncovered, Matt Howard is promptly fired by the Peytons, a wealthy family in Williamsburg during the Revolutionary War era. Undeterred, Matt returns to court the family's daughter, Jane, and the two marry and raise a family in the Virginia backwoods, infuriating the Peytons. The birth of a crippled son results in years of tension between Matt and Jane, and, when Matt decides to join the army, Jane makes a stunning decision.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In this sci-fi classic, a spacecraft travels to the distant planet Altair IV to discover the fate of a group of scientists sent there decades earlier. When Commander John J. Adams and his crew arrive, they discover only two people: Dr. Morbius and his daughter, Altaira, who was born on the remote planet. Soon, Adams begins to uncover the mystery of what happened on Altair IV, and why Morbius and Altaira are the sole survivors.

programme.title: Hot Summer Night
programme.desc: An out-of-work reporter (Leslie Nielsen) seeks out a bank robber, and his bride (Colleen Miller) has to rescue him.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: The Man With the Golden Arm
programme.desc: When illegal card dealer and recovering heroin addict Frankie Machine (Frank Sinatra) gets out of prison, he decides to straighten up. Armed with nothing but an old drum set, Frankie tries to get honest work as a drummer. But when his former employer, small-time con man Schwiefka (Robert Strauss), and Frankie's old drug dealer, Louis (Darren McGavin), re-enter his life, Frankie finds it hard to stay clean and eventually finds himself succumbing to his old habits.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson try to trace an undetectable murder weapon.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rimfire
programme.desc: An undercover Army captain (James Millican) links missing gold and murder to a gambler's (Reed Hadley) ghost.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When gang members feed Shotgun Gibbs' mule, Roscoe, a deadly amount of alcohol, Earp sends for Doc Fabrique to treat the animal while he pushes ahead and tracks down the group responsible, but Shotgun's fury imperils the situation.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The arrival of actress Cora Campbell in Dodge City sparks a rivalry between silversmith Tom Tanner and gunslinger Clay Bronson, but when Tom blames Clay for beating him up in an alley, Earp suspects a different attacker.

programme.title: First Men in the Moon
programme.desc: Around the turn of the 20th century, Joseph Cavor (Lionel Jeffries), a brilliant British scientist, creates his own spacecraft and takes a trip to the moon, accompanied by explorers Arnold Bedford (Edward Judd) and Kate Callender (Martha Hyer). After landing, they encounter an insect-like alien race that lives under the moon's surface, which has an air-like atmosphere. After glimpsing the extraterrestrial society, the group must soon escape back to Earth.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: After Dr. Bronson (Hayden Rorke) discovers Zyra, a new planet, fellow astronomer Dr. Hendron (Larry Keating) checks Bronson's data and reaches the horrifying conclusion that Bellus, a star in Zyra's orbit, is doomed to crash into the Earth within a matter of months. Meanwhile, Hendron's daughter, Joyce (Barbara Rush), has grown fond of pilot David Randall (Richard Derr), and pleads to have him brought along as a small group is relocated to Zyra to avoid the impending mass destruction.

programme.title: Conquest of Space
programme.desc: A captain (Walter Brooke), his son (Eric Fleming), a sergeant (Mickey Shaughnessy) and crew take off from a space station in a rocket ship for Mars.

programme.title: Marooned
programme.desc: American astronauts Buzz (Gene Hackman), Jim (Richard Crenna) and Clayton (James Franciscus) are stranded in space on their return journey from a new space station when malfunctioning rocket boosters bring the craft to a halt. With the men drifting in orbit, facing death from declining oxygen levels in the shuttle, NASA director Charles Keith (Gregory Peck) quickly mobilizes to launch a bold rescue mission -- but a hurricane headed for the launch site may ensure the astronauts' demise.

programme.title: Forbidden Planet
programme.desc: In this sci-fi classic, a spacecraft travels to the distant planet Altair IV to discover the fate of a group of scientists sent there decades earlier. When Commander John J. Adams and his crew arrive, they discover only two people: Dr. Morbius and his daughter, Altaira, who was born on the remote planet. Soon, Adams begins to uncover the mystery of what happened on Altair IV, and why Morbius and Altaira are the sole survivors.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: When a UFO lands in Washington, D.C., bearing a message for Earth's leaders, all of humanity stands still. Klaatu has come on behalf of alien life who have been watching Cold War-era nuclear proliferation on Earth. But it is Klaatu's soft-spoken robot Gort that presents a more immediate threat to onlookers. A single mother and her son teach the world about peace and tolerance in this moral fable, ousting the tanks and soldiers that greet the alien's arrival.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: Klaatu and his guardian robot, Gort, come from afar to warn Earth about nuclear war.

programme.title: They Rode West

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: An outlaw (Glenn Ford) blamed for a bank robbery helps a Utah sheriff (Randolph Scott) catch the real culprits.

programme.title: This Land Is Mine
programme.desc: In a Nazi-occupied European nation, Albert Lory (Charles Laughton) is a meek schoolmaster who is dominated by both his students and his elderly mother, Emma (Una O'Connor). Though Albert is initially wary of efforts to oppose the invading soldiers, he changes his tune after he's falsely accused of murder. He begins to make rousing speeches against the Nazis and their collaborators, prompting Maj. Erich von Keller (Walter Slezak) to offer Albert a pardon if he aids the Nazi cause.

programme.title: The War Wagon
programme.desc: An ex-convict and his partner eye an armored stagecoach full of gold fitted with a Gatling gun for protection.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Dr. Allen Seward (Robert Francis) is the new doctor at a remote Army outpost. His liberal attitudes towards Native Americans become a source of tension between him and his superiors, especially Capt. Peter Blake (Philip Carey), who regards all Native Americans as dangerous and untrustworthy. Seward's insistence on treating several local Kiowa tribespeople for malaria further enrages Blake, who deems Seward a traitor when the Kiowa join forces with the Comanches and attack the fort.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: The Durango kid aims to break up Pop Ryland's gang of bank robbers but ends up saving the outlaw's son Tommy Ryland who has been marked for death.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A young woman is offered a lucrative post as governess to a small boy, provided she complies with several unusual requests made by her new employer.

This Land Is Mine
programme.desc: In a Nazi-occupied European nation, Albert Lory (Charles Laughton) is a meek schoolmaster who is dominated by both his students and his elderly mother, Emma (Una O'Connor). Though Albert is initially wary of efforts to oppose the invading soldiers, he changes his tune after he's falsely accused of murder. He begins to make rousing speeches against the Nazis and their collaborators, prompting Maj. Erich von Keller (Walter Slezak) to offer Albert a pardon if he aids the Nazi cause.

programme.title: They Died With Their Boots On
programme.desc: George Armstrong Custer (Errol Flynn) is a rebellious but ambitious soldier, eager to join the Civil War. During the war, Custer has numerous successes to his credit, even though he disobeys orders. After the war concludes, he marries Libby Bacon (Olivia de Havilland) and is assigned to the Dakota Territory. Custer negotiates honestly with the Sioux on land, but due to corruption from others, a battle with Sitting Bull's forces occurs at Little Big Horn.

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: Sheriff Steve Upton (Randolph Scott) is a devoted lawman who works tirelessly to keep order in his small town, nestled within the Utah territory. So, when Cheyenne Rogers (Glenn Ford), an old friend with a criminal past, rolls into town, Upton is immediately on edge. Cheyenne assures his pal that all that's behind him now. But when the town bank is robbed, Cheyenne becomes the locals' number one suspect. He'll have to prove his innocence to save himself and his friend's reputation.

programme.title: Seven Angry Men
programme.desc: Abolitionist John Brown's (Raymond Massey) fight against slavery ends with his 1859 arsenal raid at Harpers Ferry.

programme.title: The War Wagon
programme.desc: An ex-convict and his partner eye an armored stagecoach full of gold fitted with a Gatling gun for protection.

The nation's fathers harmonize their way through the founding of America in this musical adapted from a popular Broadway show. Colonial representatives gather in Philadelphia with the aim of establishing a set of governmental rules for the burgeoning United States. Benjamin Franklin (Howard da Silva) and John Adams (William Daniels) charge Thomas Jefferson (Ken Howard) with the work of writing a statement announcing the new country's emancipation from British rule.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: In the Wild West, the Rawhide way station becomes the center of a hostage situation when four murderous fugitives (Hugh Marlowe, Dean Jagger, Jack Elam, George Tobias) take it over in a heist scheme. After killing the stationmaster (Tyrone Power), the criminals keep the only other employee, Sam Todd (Edgar Buchanan), alive to avoid outside suspicion by maintaining a front of normalcy. But Todd and the other hostages, Vinnie Holt (Susan Hayward) and her young niece, plot to make an escape.

programme.title: Gunsmoke: To the Last Man
programme.desc: As usual, trouble finds retired U.S. Marshal Matt Dillon (James Arness). In this case, it all starts when he is called upon to retrieve some stolen cattle. In short order, a close friend of the lawman is violently gunned down, and Dillon must deal with the culprits: a gang of ruthless cattle rustlers, led by the demented Col. Tucker (Pat Hingle). As Dillon and his daughter, Beth (Amy Stock-Poynton), track them down to Pleasant Valley, Ariz., they are drawn into a larger land-grab war.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross

Former judge and prosecutor Kevin Ross adjudicates real cases, in which he tries to show litigants alternative ways of dealing with their issues and make them consider the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: Americans just can't get enough courtroom drama, as is evidenced by yet another addition into the daytime court show fray. programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.desc: A freak weather system strands two sailors on a lifeless Mexican desert island with no food or water and staving off death by exposure; a hiker with a broken femur fights for his life in the middle of Joshua Tree National Park's punishing heat.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: Three teenagers find themselves stranded on a remote northern Canadian island for three weeks, facing death by starvation as winter closes in; a quick hike in Utah's Bryce Canyon suddenly turns into a four-day struggle for survival.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive
programme.desc: A young couple go off a trail for a photo and can't find their way back, and their 3-day attempt to hike down extreme mountainous terrain leads them into a dead-end canyon.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: Freezing rain scatters Gary's team, forcing him to work solo to open the continent's busiest border crossing; in Windsor, Brad, Eric and crew fear a tragedy when they untangle a sedan badly crushed by a semi.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A storm sweeps across the province, sending heavy rescue crews scrambling; in Hamilton, Kevin fights to clear a wreck in time for the plows to get through.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401

programme.title: Backroad Truckers
programme.desc: Dave and his daughter Alyssa struggle to recover a vintage ore cart from an abandoned copper mine; Angela struggles on what should be an easy job, and Dale goes on an epic hunt for furnace oil for Donny's shop.

programme.title: Backroad Truckers

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: If it's an animal roaming the wild, Jim Shockey has probably hunted it. The veteran wilderness guide and outfitter has tracked game in more than 40 countries and taken in excess of 300 species using bow, muzzleloader and rifle. In addition, Shockey has exclusive guiding territories on Vancouver Island, in the Yukon Territory, in Mexico's Sonoran Desert, and in his native Saskatchewan, all of which helps supply content for the hunting adventures seen in this award-winning series. Jim's daughter Eva, a full-fledged hunter in her own right, joins her dad on many episodes.

programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day and, out on his first date in nine years, Ross meets up with his ex-wife; Monica, Phoebe and Rachel rebel against the spirit of the day by burning mementos of past relationships.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel accidentally lets Ross' pet monkey escape, and the friends form a search party; she is then horrified to learn that her former best friend is engaged to her ex-fiance.

programme.desc: Rachel is asked to be the maid of honor in her ex-fiance's (Mitchell Whitfield) wedding.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica, Rachel and Phoebe go on a covert operation to track down the woman who stole Monica's credit card.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Former "Shadetree Mechanic" and "Two Guys Garage" host Sam Memmolo, a pioneer in automotive how-to TV, is back turning wrenches and tightening bolts on "Sam's Garage." Memmolo helped develop the concept of step-by-step instructions to help advise viewers of the latest products and techniques for repairing and improving a wide variety of rides, a legacy that continues on his latest series. With vast automotive knowledge in the garage and in the studio, Memmolo is as entertaining as he is experienced. Sam Mahdavi also hosts.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: At Amalgam Collection, detail is everything. In life, attention to detail can be the difference between safety and disaster, or the difference between something ordinary and something loved. Their models carry that same weight. Each is built from thousands of precisely crafted parts, painted to factory specification, and finished so faithfully that scale disappears. What results is not a toy but a study in discipline and passion.

programme.title: Wild About Animals - The Lords of the Artic
programme.desc: Learning all about the polar bear; hop aboard a tundra buggy; then meet two polar bear cubs that were orphaned in the wild; learn what was done to save these cute creatures and give them a new lease on life. (Animals, Instructional)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk Gets Lotto Fever
programme.desc: Monk becomes jealous of Natalie's fame when she becomes California's new lotto girl; Natalie becomes embroiled in a scandal when the lotto machine is discovered to be rigged. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk Gets Hypnotized
programme.desc: When Monk undergoes hypnosis therapy, he reverts to his 9-year-old personality. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk and the Other Brother
programme.desc: Monk's half-brother, Jack Jr., breaks into Monk's apartment and manipulates him into helping find the person Jack Jr. claims framed him for murder. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk on Wheels
programme.desc: When Natalie unwittingly helps a thief steal the bicycle of a biotech CEO (Bradley Whitford), she ropes Monk into solving the crime. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk's Favorite Show
programme.desc: Monk is thrilled to be the bodyguard of a former child star after an attempt is made on her life, until he learns how different she is from her TV alter ego. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk and the UFO
programme.desc: When Monk and Natalie get stuck in a small desert town, he must uncover the link between a missing woman and a UFO sighting. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk Takes the Stand
programme.desc: Monk's phobias threaten to undermine a murder case when an aggressive defense attorney targets his unconventional methods in court. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.title: Monk - Mr. Monk and the Voodoo Curse
programme.desc: A voodoo curse seems to be at work when dolls sent to San Francisco residents accurately predict inexplicable deaths, including possibly Natalie's. Meat Loaf guest stars. (Comedy, Drama)

programme.desc: Walker and Trivette bag the drug ring's mastermind; a man Alex has been dating may be the serial rapist. (Drama)

programme.desc: Walker is assigned to protect a famous singer whose wealthy ex-husband is willing to try anything to get her back. (Drama)

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Dan Ball brings the political headlines by interviewing newsmakers of the day, including politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: (2023) Seventh instalment in the frenetic sci-fi franchise. The Maximals - part animal, part robot - join the Autobots to battle against planet-munching Unicron and his Terrorcon cronies.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead...
programme.desc: ...Reckoning: (2023) Tom Cruise returns as Ethan Hunt and jumps a motorbike off a mountain for real. There's some stuff about an all-powerful AI. But it's the thrills that we're here for!

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: (2020) Dark comedy drama based on a viral Twitter thread. Dancer Zola (Taylour Paige) joins a road trip to Tampa, where she gets dragged too far into the sex work world. Adults only.

programme.title: Trance
programme.desc: (2013) Danny Boyle's thriller stars James McAvoy, Rosario Dawson and Vincent Cassel in a complex tale about hypnotism and a daring art heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest
programme.desc: (1960) Adventure with Richard Greene, Peter Cushing and a young Oliver Reed. Can Robin Hood foil the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham's evil plan to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury?

programme.title: Robin and Marian
programme.desc: (1976) Touching romance starring Sean Connery and Audrey Hepburn. The ageing legend Robin Hood returns to Sherwood Forest and discovers that, while he was away, Marian has become an Abbess.

programme.title: Turner & Hooch
programme.desc: (1989) Comedy-thriller starring Tom Hanks. A cop investigates a murder to which there's just one witness: Hooch, a slobbering, beer-drinking French mastiff, who now needs 24/7 protection.

programme.title: Gemini Man
programme.desc: (2019) Will Smith stars in Ang Lee's action-thriller as both an over-the-hill hitman and the young clone of himself sent to take him out. With Clive Owen.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: (2023) Maximilian Erlenwein's breath-holding underwater survival thriller about two sisters on a fateful diving expedition, starring Louisa Kause and Sophie Lowe.

programme.title: Anaïs in Love
programme.desc: (2021) Romcom with Anaïs Demoustier. A young woman can't seem to stay still or move on, as she seeks satisfaction through a variety of complicated relationships. Sex/nudity. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Small World
programme.desc: Sitcom. Two surprise visitors arrive at the flat - threatening to upset Ryan. Ep2/5.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: Forty Guns
programme.desc: (1957) Western. Barbara Stanwyck stars as a cattle rancher who, with her hired guns, rules a town as if it were her own. But then a federal marshal (Barry Sullivan) arrives on the scene.

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June
programme.desc: (1956) Wartime romance set against the background of the D-Day landings, starring Robert Taylor and Dana Wynter. A married American officer embarks on an affair with English nurse.

programme.title: The Poseidon Adventure
programme.desc: (1972) Action adventure. Gene Hackman stars as a priest who leads a ragtag group of survivors on a life-or-death quest to escape from the capsized ocean liner Poseidon.

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: (2011) Romance meets sci-fi thriller. Matt Damon and Emily Blunt star as a politician and a dancer who begin to suspect that a shadowy group of men are interfering with their lives.

programme.title: Cocaine Bear
programme.desc: (2023) Darkly comic ursine misadventure about a disparate group of people who happen across a coked-up bear - aka Pablo Eskobear - in the American wilderness. With Keri Russell.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: (1985) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems...

programme.title: Crimetime
programme.desc: (1996) Thriller with Stephen Baldwin and Pete Postlethwaite. An actor makes a comfortable living through crime reconstructions on TV. But then a real-life murderer comes on the scene...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: (2005) Comedy. Ben (Jimmy Fallon) must choose between his two loves: Lindsey (Drew Barrymore) and the Boston Red Sox baseball team. Based on Nick Hornby's novel Fever Pitch.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth
programme.desc: (1954) Medieval action-adventure starring Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh. When a peasant discovers his true lineage, he sets out to woo his noble sweetheart and avenge his father's murder.

programme.title: The Yellow Mountain
programme.desc: (1954) Western. Lex Barker and Howard Duff star as prospectors whose friendship is tested when a promising seam of the gold is discovered in a Nevada mountain. With Mala Powers.

programme.title: Anastasia
programme.desc: (1956) Historical drama. The Oscar-winning Ingrid Bergman stars as an amnesiac refugee who Yul Brynner tries to pass off as the daughter of the murdered Tsar of Russia, Nicholas II.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: (2023) Jennifer Lawrence stars as a woman hired for a summer to make a shy young lad a man before he heads off to college. Will there be any feelings in the end, hard or otherwise?

programme.title: The Black Phone
programme.desc: (2021) Horror with Ethan Hawke. Denver 1974 and The Grabber is abducting boys from the street. But he doesn't reckon on two kids with uncanny abilities who refuse to do as they're told.

programme.title: The Pillow Book
programme.desc: (1996) Ewan McGregor stars as an English translator who falls for Japanese beauty Nagiko (Vivian Wu) in Peter Greenaway's drama of love, fetish, betrayal and death. Sexual scenes.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: The 300 Spartans
programme.desc: (1962) Historical drama with Ralph Richardson. A retelling of the stand made at Thermopylae in 480 BC by a small Greek force against invasion by an enormous Persian army.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: (2018) Fact-based crime biopic starring Robert Redford and Sissy Spacek. Charming 74-year-old bank robber Forrest Tucker falls for an enchanting farmer. But is he ready to retire?

programme.title: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: (2004) Drama. Dennis Quaid stars as the captain of an aircraft downed in the desert. There's no hope of rescue, unless he and the survivors can build another plane from the wreckage.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: (2021) Action thriller with Bob Odenkirk. He's just a dad who goes to work and takes out the trash. But really he's an ex-assassin about to unleash his true self... and take out the trash.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: The Second Act
programme.desc: (2024) Quentin Dupieux's film-industry satire about a bunch of anxious actors stuck in a formulaic movie about relationship troubles, starring Louis Garrel, Raphaël Quenard and Léa Seydoux.

programme.title: Deerskin
programme.desc: (2019) Comedy horror. A middle-aged man (Jean Dujardin) buys a deerskin jacket to kick off his post-divorce life. Fine - until the jacket starts talking to him...

programme.title: ITV News

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Classic action-adventure film starring Sam Neill and Laura Dern, 1993. A band of humans fight for survival when cloned dinosaurs break loose during a tour of a new theme park.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Vardys
programme.desc: La Dolce Vardy: After an injury derails Jamie's debut at Cremonese and the move from Leicester to Italy proves stressful for Becky and the kids, can the family settle into local life? S1 Ep2

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David and his dealers visit Nottingham's Albert Hall. Fay Rutter is faced with tourist treasures and Tim Hogarth is offered a gold haul from around the world.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: Camargue: James's culinary tour takes him to the Camargue, where he learns about the Camargue bull and fleur de sel, a delicate salty crust which is hand-harvested in local waters. S1 Ep13

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Bond film starring George Lazenby and Telly Savalas, 1969. 007 encounters Blofeld once more as the villain plans to unleash a plague through brainwashed 'angels of death'.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: Best of DW Vodcasts
programme.desc: Select DW video podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.title: Couchsurfing in Argentina
programme.desc: S1 E176 Fußballfieber, Tango und wildes Patagonien Argentina is in turmoil, as President Milei reshapes the country with radical austerity measures. Subsidies are being cut, the state is shrinking, and reforms are dividing society. What does this mean for the people living there?

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: New thinking and technology are revolutionizing our cars, our cities, our way of life. Rev doesn't just want to know how fast we get from A to B, but how we get there as well. The world of cars and mobility is in flux. Rev casts a critical eye on new cars and examines climate-friendly solutions, looks into unusual new ideas and visions of the future. Take a spin through new possibilities every week with REV.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: It is all about dedicated reporters who are at the top table of world affairs and provide on-the-spot commentary from different parts of Germany, Europe and around the globe. programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: Science show on DW provides its viewers a weekly dose of useful scientific information regarding various areas. If you are into cosmos and universe, then this show is made for you. programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: In Good Shape is the weekly health show on DW, entirely dedicated to health care. Find out everything about new medical treatments, alternative medicine, wellness, fitness, and nutrition. The show's hosts and guests discuss key topics with specialists, and offer opportunities to receive tips and tools for a healthy lifestyle directly from experts. Learn how natural remedies can help you stay healthier, how you can maintain a healthy diet, how to manage stress and how to improve your quality of life.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: In this week's show, we explore the complex issue of tribalism. We travel to Kenya to meet a couple whose love defies societal norms. Our resident rapper, Killa Ace, shares his heartbreak after being prohibited from marrying the woman he loves due to their different tribes. In our Street Debate, we hear from Nigerian youths who are breaking free from tribalism.

programme.title: Made in Germany
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europe's strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work. We focus on the impact technology is having on business, company ethics and practices and the social issues across the country's workforce. These stories and experiences shine a light on how global business is changing.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Babies
programme.desc: The European eel is threatened with extinction. But it is also a highly sought-after commodity on the global market. The trade in young eels is booming. And it's increasingly controlled by organized crime.

programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: Best of DW-online Content

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: In Good Shape is the weekly health show on DW, entirely dedicated to health care. Find out everything about new medical treatments, alternative medicine, wellness, fitness, and nutrition. The show's hosts and guests discuss key topics with specialists, and offer opportunities to receive tips and tools for a healthy lifestyle directly from experts. Learn how natural remedies can help you stay healthier, how you can maintain a healthy diet, how to manage stress and how to improve your quality of life.

programme.title: DW News Focus

programme.title: Close up
programme.desc: The Current Affairs Documentary The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, "Close up" is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: Can I use blockchain technology? Will artificial intelligence take over my career? What exactly is "Machine Learning"? These are some of the questions "SHIFT - Living in the Digital Age" tries to answer. The program focuses on a single topic - in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Eco-at-India
programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. Eco India is a DW program entirely dedicated to Indian subcontinent and it looks at possibilities to strike a balance, and make consumption more sustainable, in such way to avoid point of no return. The program draws our attention to such essential aspects as being mindful about how much fuel, electricity, plastic, water we are using, so we can manage household budget and give a boost to climate change.

programme.title: The Milwaukee Cannibal
programme.desc: The graphic novel ""My Friend Dahmer" recounts the early years of a serial killer in the US. This deeply disturbing book by Derf Backder, a school friend of Dahmer's, delves into the depths of human madness.

programme.desc: Miles de repartidores proceden de la India, atraídos por estudiar en Alemania.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. The service is transmitted worldwide via satellite with a reach of more than 197 million people on a weekly basis. Their motto is Made for minds. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is even more important, reliable source of news, the content is intended to be independent of government influence.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.desc: What drives people in Europe - politically, socially and culturally? How do Europeans lead their lives? What are their views, hopes and fears? Focus on Europe - Spotlight on People provides the answers.
